dialogos.texto_en: (In the end, we arrived at the destination\n without knowing what to talk about...)
Well, where should we start exploring?\nThere seems to be plenty of sights to see.
Uesugi-kun?
(In this case...\n Whether I'm hated or angry,\n it's natural to apologize first.)
Itsuki, I'm sorry.
...Why are you apologizing?
Why? I mean...\nbecause I made you angry yesterday.
I see, so you're apologizing because you made me angry.
Huh?
Because you made me angry%p-2;――%p; In other words,\nyou think you did something wrong, so you apologized.
No, not wrong...\nI made you feel uncomfortable, right? To the point\nyou wanted to run away. So, I apologized%p-2;――
Your premise is wrong.
Huh?
I didn't run away because I didn't like it.\nPlease don't make assumptions.
Huh...
Th-that was, you know,\nI wasn't prepared for that! It was too sudden!
Besides, we've only been dating for six months,\nand you suddenly kissed me!\nAnd, in public too!
Ooh...
Are you bad at love, Uesugi-kun?!\nDon't you understand the concept of distance?!
You...!\nYou're one to talk!
You've been acting strange since we came to Okinawa,\nhaven't you?!
You don't normally ask for things,\nor walk next to me, or call me by my first name!
Well...that's true!
I'm dating you, you know!\nI'm your b-boyfriend! Aren't I?!!?
Of course I'd get carried away\nif you did something like that!
E-excuse me, but that's just a cop out.
That's not it at all! It's a legitimate argument!
...Heheh!\nWhat's that supposed to mean?
Don't laugh.\nI'm being serious.
I understand.
I mean...\nI don't mean to blame you for everything.\nI just have my own thoughts on it%p-2;――
I understand that too.
...Really?
This kind of argument is the kind of distance\nwe're comfortable with, isn't it?
As I thought...\nromance like in movies or manga was too much for us.
Huh? What are you talking about?
Actually%p-2;――
%p-2;――%p; In other words,\nyou were practicing actions that you researched\nin books and on the internet, right?
Th-that's what I mean.\nIt didn't...go very well, though.
(I see.\n The riddle of Itsuki's actions are finally solved...)
...Heheh!\nHahahahahahahaha!
Wh-why are you laughing?\nI've made up my mind and confided in you, you know?!
No, it's impossible not to laugh.\nBecause, you see%p-2;――
You told me that there are many things\nyou can't understand just from textbooks.
Just for the record, you did say that, yeah?
Just do as you please.\nThere are things you can only understand by trying.
That's right...\nI completely forgot,\nand relied too much on textbooks...
B-but Uesugi-kun, you remembered it well.
Well, I guess.
(Itsuki's words at that time\n were like a guiding light for me.\n I couldn't forget them.)
My goodness, that's just stupid.\nTo forget the advice you gave to someone else\nand then make the same mistake yourself.
It's annoying to say this, but...\nmaybe we're really similar after all.
Teehee!\nI'm really sorry about this,\nbut that might be true.
In the end, even if I studied about love,\nI couldn't understand the correct way to do it.
But, maybe that's okay.\nThere's no such thing as a correct way to love\nin the first place.
So, um... The way you and I love each other...\nis something we'll create together from now on, right?
...Yeah.\nI don't know how it'll turn out,\nbut let's move forward in our own way.
Yes.\nSo, again%p-2;――
Uesugi-kun,\nI'm looking forward to my relationship with you.
Me too.
...So?\nWhat are we going to do now?
What do you mean?
I had actually asked everyone to make some time\nfor us to talk together.
Ah, that's why the schedule suddenly changed.
I was planning to get some time with you\nfor a little while before we went to the beach...
But, I didn't think it would be a whole day.
For sure.\nIf it's just talking,\nwe didn't have to come all the way here.
(However, thinking about it on the way here\n helped me organize my thoughts,\n so it wasn't a waste of time.)
Well, since we're here,\nlet's spend some time together...on a date.
A date...!
Y-yes, indeed!\nLet's spend the day together.
Alright, let's get going.
